0.q: The activities of the SOD, POD, and CAT in the OE-1 and OE-3 lines were significantly higher than those of CK and EV at 7 and 15 dpt; contents of O2- and H2O2 in the OE-1 and OE-3 lines were significantly lower.

2.q: The overexpression of LpBLH3 can enhance lignin accumulation in root and stem by positively modulating the expression of crucial genes within the lignin biosynthesis pathway.

3.q: The overexpressed plants had significantly higher resistance than the wild type... the overexpression of the LpGDSL gene reduced the accumulation of ROS in the plants under salt stress.

4.q: Co-transformation of pGBKT7-LpBLH3 and pGADT7-LpKNAT3 into Y2H Gold yeast strains enabled growth on SD/QDO + X-α-gal + AbA medium, and the colonies turned blue. LCI analysis further validated the interaction between LpBLH3 and LpKNAT3 proteins.

5.q: The successfully constructed pGBKT7-LpMYB4 was transformed into the Y2HGold yeast strain. The screened interacting protein pGADT7-LpTrx or pGADT7-LpGPX6 was constructed into pGADT7 vector and co-transformed into Y2HGold yeast strain.

6.q: The OEC of higher plants consists of three external proteins with apparent molecular weights of 33, 24 and 17 kDa, which are called PsbO, PsbP and PsbQ, respectively.

8.q: After 24 h of treatment with 20 mM NaHCO3, the expression levels of stress-related genes LpABI5 were found to be higher in the three LpBLH3 overexpressing lines compared to the WT.

9.q: the expression levels of these genes were significantly higher in the three LpBLH3 overexpressing lines compared to the WT... overexpression of LpBLH3 positively regulates the expression of crucial genes in the lignin biosynthesis pathway.

10.q: The expression levels of key genes involved in the lignin synthesis pathway, including LpPAL, Lp4CL, LpC3H, LpC4H, LpCCoAOMT, and LpF5H, were significantly higher in the three LpBLH3 overexpressing lines compared to the WT.

11.q: The yeast one-hybrid assay and transcriptional activation assay confirmed that B3 transcription factors could act on LpGDSL promoters.

12.q: EMSA and LUC analyses confirmed that LpBLH3 can bind to the promoter of LpABI5 and upregulate the expression of ABI5 downstream genes (LpCAT1/LpATEM/LpRD29B).

13.q: The lignin content in the stems of all three overexpression lines was significantly higher than that of the WT. The LpGDSL may confer salinity resistance to the plants by increasing the lignin content.

14.q: In addition, H2O2 scavenging in transgenic plants was much improved, indicating increased resistance to NaHCO3 stress.

15.q: In addition, H2O2 scavenging in transgenic plants was much improved, indicating increased resistance to NaHCO3 stress.

16.q: L. pumilum will promote the expression of LpPsbP, which will then directly scavenge reactive oxygen species (ROS) in order to protect its photosystem II, reduce its damage.

17.q: The yeast two-hybrid and BiFC assays demonstrated the existence of an interaction between LpGDSL and LpBCP.

18.q: The yeast two-hybrid and BiFC assays demonstrated the existence of an interaction between LpGDSL and LpBCP.
